com.google.prefab.api.NoMatchingLibraryException: No compatible library found for //ReactAndroid/hermestooling. Rejected the following libraries:
android.arm64-v8a: User is targeting armeabi-v7a but library is for arm64-v8a
android.armeabi-v7a: User has minSdkVersion 22 but library was built for 24
android.x86: User is targeting armeabi-v7a but library is for x86
android.x86_64: User is targeting armeabi-v7a but library is for x86_64

android.arm64-v8a: User is targeting armeabi-v7a but library is for arm64-v8a
android.armeabi-v7a: User has minSdkVersion 22 but library was built for 24
android.x86: User is targeting armeabi-v7a but library is for x86
android.x86_64: User is targeting armeabi-v7a but library is for x86_64
